title: Interaction Resources, Typed Parts, Conversation State, and Retention · Failure Triage
summary: A preserved agent trajectory contains one plausible model, schema, tool, authority, state, loop, memory, concurrency, injection, evaluation, telemetry, deployment, or recovery defect; locate the first failed invariant before editing. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in typed Gemini interaction and state ledger and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and eviden…
objectives: Model each interaction with stable local identity, provider interaction ID, parent, state mode, timestamps, model, configuration, and outcome.
Preserve text, function call, function result, image, file, refusal, safety, and model-output parts without lossy string flattening.
Use previous_interaction_id deliberately, distinguish server-side history from stateless replay, and preserve local audit evidence.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-ai-agent-python cumulative safe evaluated AI agent portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python interaction, tool, policy, state, memory,
evaluation, telemetry, and recovery models with original fixed in-memory fixtures only.
Provider APIs, Gemini models, native google-genai, google-adk, Pydantic, HTTP, credentials,
host files, code execution, browsers, databases, telemetry backends, load, cost, privacy review,
and production effects require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class AgentPolicy:
    stakeholder_task_id: str
    allowed_tool_names: tuple[str, ...]
    maximum_steps: int = 12
    maximum_tool_calls: int = 8
    approval_required_for_writes: bool = True


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class AgentEvidence:
    revision: str
    model_config_digest: str
    policy_digest: str
    evaluation_digest: str
    recovery_drill_id: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Safe evaluated Python AI agent portfolio ready"

steps.title: Safe AI agents and Python Implement the cause-level repair · Debug State Retention Choice
steps.instruction:
Append a runnable pure-Python function headed "# Evidence: agentpy-state-retention-choice-13rdei" that uses case 3161 to reconcile interaction resources, typed parts, previous identifiers, per-turn configuration, state choice, and retention evidence. Keep its defaults runnable, assert an invariant, and return observable changed-case evidence. Browser code must not contact provider APIs, invoke Gemini models, import or claim native google-genai, google-adk, or Pydantic behavior, open sockets, read or write host files, use credentials, execute generated code, launch browsers, reach databases or telemetry backends, or claim live privacy, load, safety, cost, or production behavior; verify those boundaries later with Python 3.14.6, google-genai 2.11.0, google-adk 2.4.0, Pydantic 2.13.4, fixed provider fixtures, fake transports, controlled local services, disposable cloud projects, representative eval sets, accessibility, privacy and security review, load, canary, rollback, recovery, and release gates.

Evidence target: Safe AI agents and Python Implement the cause-level repair · Debug State Retention Choice.
steps.why: Building a runnable or mechanically reviewable artifact turns State Retention Choice into observable performance evidence. For Safe AI agents and Python Implement the cause-level repair · Debug State Retention Choice, keep State Retention Choice connected to executable Python model, interaction, tool, policy, state, approval, evaluation, security, deployment, and recovery decision evidence.

content.code:
# Evidence: agentpy-state-retention-choice-13rdei
# Competency: agentpy-state-retention-choice.
# Case 3161: a controlled support-operations rehearsal.
# Operating constraint: every external effect requires explicit least-authority policy.
# Changed case: change one eval case, rubric, model version, token price, rate limit, or latency distribution and rerun release gates.
def evidence_agentpy_state_retention_choice_13rdei(interactions: int = 12, correlated_interactions: int = 12, part_types: int = 5, redeclared_configs: int = 12, ambiguous_state_links: int = 0) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_13rdei = "13rdei-iedr31-3161"
    assert evidence_variant_13rdei
    evidence_axes_13rdei = (
        "authority13rdei",
        "interaction3161",
        "tooliedr31",
        "state13rdei3161",
        "evaluation316113rdei",
        "recoveryiedr313161",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_13rdei)) == 6
    if interactions < 1 or correlated_interactions < 0:
        return False, correlated_interactions, "interaction-count"
    if correlated_interactions != interactions:
        return False, correlated_interactions, "interaction-correlation"
    if part_types < 3 or redeclared_configs != interactions:
        return False, part_types, "part-or-config-gap"
    if ambiguous_state_links > 0:
        return False, ambiguous_state_links, "state-ambiguity"
    assert correlated_interactions == interactions and ambiguous_state_links == 0
    return True, correlated_interactions, "typed-interaction-state"
